---
title: "`r gsub('.rmarkdown', ' ', gsub('_', ' ', knitr::current_input()))`"
author: "Holly Beale"
date: "`r format(Sys.time(), '%B %d, %Y')`"
format: 
  gfm:
    toc: true
    df-print: kable
---

```{r setup}

library(tidyverse)

```



```{r}

intron_coverage_duration <- tribble(
  ~n, 	~seconds,
  1,	3311,
8,	3584,
16,	6695,
16, 6490) %>%
  mutate(seconds_per_sample = seconds/n,
         min_per_sample = seconds_per_sample/60)

intron_coverage_duration

```
